rechargeGuidePage.title: Panxing Global Mobile Game Order Guide
rechargeGuidePage.subtitle: To help you recharge faster, we prepared two official ordering channels. Submit details by following the page steps, and support will process your order quickly based on the info you provide.

method1.title: Method 1: WeChat Official Account (Recommended)
method1.desc: Best for quick consultation, adding order details, and real-time progress tracking.
method1.qrAlt: Panxing Global Mobile Game WeChat QR code
method1.step1: Open WeChat and tap the scan button in the top-right corner.
method1.step2: Scan the QR code and follow the official account "Panxing Global Mobile Game".
method1.step3: Send order details: game name + server + role ID + recharge package.
method1.step4: Pay as instructed by support, send payment screenshot, and wait for credit confirmation.

method2.title: Method 2: Xianyu Store Escrow
method2.desc: Suitable for users who prefer platform-guaranteed payment through Xianyu.
method2.qrAlt: Panxing Global Mobile Game Xianyu store QR card
method2.step1: Save the store card image to your album first.
method2.step2: Open Xianyu and scan the QR code.
method2.step3: Enter the store, select the corresponding item, and place the order.
method2.step4: Add order note: game/server/role ID/recharge package.

orderDetails.title: Order Details and Processing Notes
orderDetails.deliveryLine1: Usually processed within 5-30 minutes; peak periods may queue.
orderDetails.deliveryLine2: If delayed, provide order screenshot and role details for priority review.
orderDetails.deliveryLine3: After completion, verify the in-game credit record as soon as possible.

security.title: Security Reminder
security.item1: Only trust the official QR codes and store info shown on this page.
security.item2: Do not transfer money to unknown accounts and never share verification codes or passwords.
security.item3: If anything looks abnormal, contact online support immediately for verification.
